scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/schemas build && bun run --cwd packages/run-store build && bun run --cwd packages/evidence-store build && bun run --cwd packages/artifact-store build && bun run --cwd packages/trace-recorder build && bun run --cwd packages/run-reports build && bun run --cwd packages/harness-loader build && bun run --cwd packages/policy-engine build && bun run --cwd packages/gate-engine build && bun run --cwd packages/tool-broker build && bun run --cwd packages/eval-runner build && bun run --cwd packages/runtime build && bun run --cwd packages/adapters-cli build
scripts.test: bun test packages/run-store/src/index.test.ts packages/evidence-store/src/index.test.ts packages/artifact-store/src/index.test.ts packages/trace-recorder/src/index.test.ts packages/run-reports/src/index.test.ts packages/harness-loader/src/index.test.ts packages/policy-engine/src/index.test.ts packages/gate-engine/src/index.test.ts packages/tool-broker/src/index.test.ts packages/eval-runner/src/index.test.ts packages/runtime/src/index.test.ts packages/adapters-cli/src/index.test.ts test/simple-app.e2e.test.ts
scripts.proof:v0: bun run build && bun test test/simple-app.e2e.test.ts
